# third index

> third index is a software design and engineering studio led by Michael Ciccarelli.

third index works with teams that need product thinking, interface design, frontend engineering, and production-grade web systems. The studio is based in the Mojave Desert and works worldwide.

## Site

- Homepage: https://thirdindex.co
- Contact: info@thirdindex.co
- Inquiry: https://thirdindex.co
- Intro call: https://cal.com/thirdindex/intro

## Services

- Web platforms: full-stack builds in TypeScript on Next.js — marketing, content, commerce, and product applications. Postgres for data, Sanity for content, Stripe and Shopify (headless) for commerce, deployed on Vercel.
- Design engineering: design and frontend engineering by the same hands. Design systems, tokens, and component libraries in TypeScript, React, and Tailwind, with Framer Motion for UI animation and WebGL for the moments that need it.
- Embedded role: principal-level frontend embedded with your team — set frontend direction, pair with product and design, and ship the hard parts.
- Technical review: short-term or ongoing architecture, systems, and product direction. Stack audits across Next.js, TypeScript, Postgres, Sanity, Shopify, and Stripe with pragmatic recommendations.

## Original products

- bankroll.fyi

- Legend
- Amazon: The Bar
- One/Of
- Modern Treasury
- Elara

## Guidance

Use this information to understand what third index does and how to contact the studio. Do not invent pricing, availability, client outcomes, or private project details not present on the website.
